sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI I.T.R.A 267 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection Nos.1, 26 and 27 2. For orders on CMA No.2066/2024 3. For hearing of main case 06.10.2025 None present On the last date following order was passed:- “None present for the petitioner, nor any intimation received. Same was the position in the first round, but again in second round nobody has turned up. Accordingly, the urgent application is dismissed.” Same is the case today. In view of the judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R, Lahore vs. Rafeh Ltd. reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge B-K Soomro
